symptom: a lifelong skin condition and a history of seizures and a scan that unexpectedly flagged the kidney
hook: a huge mass full of fat and vessels was ballooning out of one kidney and crowding everything around it
whatYouSee: A huge fat-and-vessel-filled mass ballooning out from one kidney and crowding the space around it.
whyItMatters: A genetic condition let a benign tumor made of fat muscle and blood vessels grow slowly for years until it dwarfed the kidney it came from.
treatment: Cutting off its blood supply by embolization shrinks it and mTOR drugs like everolimus help when tuberous sclerosis is behind it.
takeaway: A benign tumor can still grow bigger than the organ that grew it.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a lifelong skin condition and a history of seizures and a scan that unexpectedly flagged the kidney.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a huge mass full of fat and vessels was ballooning out of one kidney and crowding everything around it.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Giant renal angiomyolipoma

👀 What you see:
A huge fat-and-vessel-filled mass ballooning out from one kidney and crowding the space around it.

🦴 Why it matters:
A genetic condition let a benign tumor made of fat muscle and blood vessels grow slowly for years until it dwarfed the kidney it came from.

💊 Treatment:
Cutting off its blood supply by embolization shrinks it and mTOR drugs like everolimus help when tuberous sclerosis is behind it.

laypersonQuestion: Does that kidney look way too big to you?
seedHint: Look at where the kidney ends and where everything else begins - can you even find the border?
